metadata.title: Steinheim | Premium German Bathroom Fixtures in Egypt
metadata.description: Discover Steinheim's premium bathroom mixers, shower systems, and accessories. German-engineered with Sedal cartridges and Neoperl aerators. Available in 6 finishes. Exclusive to Egypt through SIG.

hero.headline: Defined by what endures
hero.subline: Premium German bathroom systems — now in Egypt

hero.headline: Architectural precision. Timeless by nature.
hero.body: Luxury bathroom systems crafted in Germany. Four collections, six finishes, one architectural language.
hero.caption: Precision in every detail. Freedom in every choice.
hero.imageAlt: Steinheim wall-mounted mixer in an architectural bathroom

statement.headline: A bathroom is not a collection of objects. It is one complete language.
statement.body: Steinheim brings products, finishes, and technical choices into a coordinated system—giving homeowners, designers, and project teams a clearer way to create spaces that feel intentional from every angle.

collections.headline: Four distinct ways to shape a room.
collections.body: From soft curves to decisive geometry, each collection carries one design idea across the products that complete a bathroom.

engineering.headline: Considered from the inside out.
engineering.body: A beautiful surface is only the beginning. Steinheim pairs its design language with specified components, coordinated product families, and practical technical information for confident residential and project decisions.
engineering.caption: Shower column · Matte Black
engineering.imageAlt: Steinheim shower column in a warm architectural shower space

finishes.headline: Surface changes everything.
finishes.body: Six finish families let the same design move from quiet and reflective to warm, graphic, or deeply architectural.
finishes.availability: Each Steinheim finish transforms the same form into a different character — from quiet chrome to dramatic matte black.

product.body: A floor-mounted bath mixer with a complete hand-shower set, available across the Joy finish palette.

assembly.body: A Steinheim bathroom is built from coordinated collections, verified model references, finish rules, and technical details that project teams can trust.

foundation.label: Collection
foundation.detail: Four Egypt collections with distinct design languages.

structure.label: Components
structure.detail: Published technical data lists 35mm Sedal cartridges and Neoperl aerators where specified.

control.label: Installation
control.detail: Common mixer specifications support standard Egyptian project planning.

flow.label: Finishes
flow.detail: Availability is verified by exact product and collection, not assumed globally.

complete.label: Proposal
complete.detail: Every visible choice can become a structured trade schedule.

precision.headline: Precision you can feel.
precision.body: Every Steinheim fixture is built around components that outlast trends — Sedal cartridges, Neoperl aerators, and PVD surfaces engineered for decades of daily use.

finishMorph.headline: Endless expression. Unified design language.
finishMorph.body: Each Steinheim finish transforms the same form into a different character — from quiet chrome to dramatic matte black, warm brushed gold to deep coffee gold.

trade.headline: From inspiration to a buildable proposal.
trade.body: Explore the catalogue, ask the AI advisor, assemble exact products and quantities, then create one structured brief for the Steinheim trade team.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: Move through collections, products, finishes, and project imagery at your own pace—or let the AI guide the route.

specify.title: Specify
specify.body: Choose exact finishes, model references, and quantities while keeping the project schedule in one place.

propose.title: Propose
propose.body: Generate a clean RFQ document for commercial pricing, stock, lead-time, and project-team review.

joy.name: Joy
joy.description: Round, refined forms for contemporary bathrooms

quatro.name: Quatro
quatro.description: Geometric lines for bold design statements

featureStrip.line: German engineering. European precision. Available in 6 finishes.

chrome.name: Chrome
chrome.description: A timeless mirror finish that reflects light and complements any bathroom palette. The most versatile choice for both classic and modern interiors.

brushedNickel.name: Brushed Nickel
brushedNickel.description: A soft satin finish with understated warmth. Resists fingerprints and water spots, making it ideal for high-traffic bathrooms.

matteBlack.name: Matte Black
matteBlack.description: A bold, light-absorbing surface that creates dramatic contrast. The defining fixture finish of contemporary design.

brushedGold.name: Brushed Gold
brushedGold.description: A warm rose-gold tone achieved through PVD coating. Fingerprint-resistant. Ideal for contemporary spaces with warm material palettes.

coffeeGold.name: Coffee Gold
coffeeGold.description: A deep, burnished gold with brown undertones. PVD-coated for durability. Pairs beautifully with dark stone and timber.

metalGun.name: Metal Gun
metalGun.description: A dark gunmetal grey with industrial character. PVD-coated for lasting performance. Suits minimalist and industrial-inspired spaces.

sedal.title: Sedal cartridges
sedal.description: Spanish-engineered ceramic cartridges with lifetime warranty. Smooth, precise control.

neoperl.title: Neoperl aerators
neoperl.description: Swiss-made aerators delivering splash-free, perfectly aerated water flow.

pvd.title: PVD finishes
pvd.description: Physical Vapor Deposition creates hard, durable, hypoallergenic surfaces.

trade.description: Steinheim's trade programme offers project pricing, sample units, specification sheets, and dedicated support for architects, interior designers, and developers across Egypt.

pricing.title: Project pricing
pricing.description: Competitive volume-based pricing for trade projects

samples.title: Sample units
samples.description: Physical samples for client presentations and mood boards

specs.title: Spec sheets
specs.description: Complete technical documentation and CAD files

support.title: Dedicated support
support.description: Direct line to our trade team for project consultation

about.narrative: At Steinheim, finishes are an essential design element, carefully developed to enhance both form and function. Every product reflects a philosophy where German precision engineering meets thoughtful, enduring design.
about.partnership: Exclusively distributed in Egypt by El Sharbatly International Group

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.pvdFinishes: PVD finishes (Matte Black, Metal Gun, Brushed Gold, Coffee Gold)
warranty.validInEgypt: Valid in Egypt only. Covers manufacturing defects, not misuse.
warranty.heroBody: Every Steinheim fixture is built to endure. Our warranty reflects the confidence we place in German engineering and precision manufacturing.

notes.sedal: The heart of every fixture — engineered to outlast the space it serves.
notes.chromeNickel: Classic finishes with enduring reflective clarity.
notes.neoperl: Precision flow technology and solid brass construction.
notes.pvd: Physical Vapour Deposition for scratch-resistant speciality tones.

claimsParagraphs: To file a warranty claim, contact your point of purchase or reach out to El Sharbatly International Group directly at {email}.
Please provide your proof of purchase, product model number, date of installation, and a description of the defect. Photos of the issue are helpful for faster processing.
Warranty claims are typically processed within 14 business days. Replacement parts or units will be provided at no cost for valid claims within the warranty period.
warranty.helpHeadline: Our team is here to help with any product concern.

footer.distributor: Exclusive distributor: El Sharbatly International Group

assistance.label: Assistance
assistance.desc: Do you need assistance or would you like to request information?

catalogues.label: Catalogues
catalogues.desc: Flip through the catalogs to find the newest collections.

hero.headline: Water, designed.
hero.body: Premium bathroom systems for homes, hospitality, and design-led projects in Egypt.

collections.title: Explore our collections
collections.joy: Soft balance for private villas, suites, and warm hospitality rooms.
collections.up: A repeatable modern language for developments and project schedules.
collections.art: Architectural precision for statement bathrooms and design-led spaces.
collections.quatro: Crisp geometry for sharp, contemporary interiors.

ritual.headline: The quiet ritual of precision.
ritual.body: Steinheim is specified where the bathroom must feel resolved: proportion, finish, mechanism, and long-term reliability working as one complete language.

trade.headline: Specifying for a project?
trade.body: Set your room composition and what each one needs once — then shop the site normally, with your rooms tracked as you go.

showroom.headline: The showroom, as it is.
showroom.body: Unfiltered footage from our Cairo showroom floor — the finishes, the mechanisms, and the space where clients specify a complete bathroom in person.

productPage.setupRoomCta: Set up your project to auto-assign this to a room
productPage.infoNote: Technical information, product details, and catalogue downloads are available below.
productPage.descriptionBody: {product} from the {series} collection brings Steinheim's architectural bathroom language into a precise, project-ready product. The current selection is shown in {finish}.
productPage.downloadsIntro: Download the current Steinheim catalogue or request the exact technical sheet for {series} {product} in {finish}.
productPage.downloadsNote: Final stock, trade pricing, lead times, and project quantities should still be confirmed with Steinheim Egypt.

context.headline: Part of a complete bathroom language.
context.body: See how the {series} collection's form, finish, and proportions work within a resolved bathroom environment.

hero.headline: A premium bathroom language for Egypt.

identity.headline: Crafting beauty, creating value.
identity.body: Steinheim Egypt presents premium European bathroom fixtures as complete design systems. The goal is not only to sell a mixer or shower, but to help homeowners, designers, developers, and hospitality teams choose a coherent bathroom direction.

european.headline: Precision becomes identity.
european.body: The Steinheim language is calm, architectural, and specification-ready. Joy, Up, Art, and Quatro give each project a distinct tone while staying consistent enough for real homes and large commercial schedules.

excellence.headline: The excellence that makes a bathroom feel complete.

quality.headline: Quality
quality.body: Quality is not a claim on the surface. It is the practical discipline behind every recommendation, product schedule, finish choice, and installation conversation.

reliability.title: Product reliability
reliability.body: Steinheim products are selected for long-term daily use across homes, hotels, villas, and developer projects in Egypt.

finish.title: Finish discipline
finish.body: Chrome and PVD finishes are treated as part of the design language, not as an afterthought. Every finish must support the room visually and practically.

specification.title: Specification clarity
specification.body: For trade clients, Steinheim works around clear product schedules, collection logic, finish direction, quantities, and project review.

support.title: Egypt support
support.body: The website guides customers toward the right direction, while final pricing, availability, and project conditions are confirmed by Steinheim Egypt.

finishes.headline: Finishes define the emotional direction.
finishes.body: Chrome, brushed nickel, matte black, brushed gold, coffee gold, and metal gun allow every bathroom to move from quiet and universal to warm, expressive, or architectural.

trade.headline: A simpler way to specify Steinheim.
trade.body: For designers, developers, contractors, and hospitality teams, Steinheim Egypt supports project logic: room types, collection direction, finishes, quantities, and one consolidated review request.

hero.headline: We'd love to hear from you.
hero.body: Whether you're designing a single bathroom or specifying for a 200-unit development, we respond within 24 hours.

fields.name: Name
fields.subject: Subject
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or question...

contactPage.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your enquiry and respond within one business day.

responseTime.label: Response time
responseTime.note: Trade enquiries receive a detailed quote with pricing, availability, and lead times.

policyCommon.lastUpdated: Last updated: June 2026. This policy applies to orders placed through steinheim-eg.com.

deliveryAreas.title: Delivery areas
content: We deliver Steinheim products throughout the Arab Republic of Egypt. All orders are shipped from our Cairo warehouse.
For addresses outside Greater Cairo, delivery timelines may vary depending on the governorate.

shippingCosts.title: Shipping costs
content: Orders above LE 15,000: Free delivery within Greater Cairo.
Orders below LE 15,000: A flat shipping fee of LE 250 applies within Greater Cairo.
Outside Greater Cairo: Shipping is calculated based on destination and order weight. You will be informed of the exact cost before confirming your order.

processingTime.title: Processing time
content: Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. You will receive a confirmation email once your order has been dispatched.
Business days are Sunday through Thursday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (Cairo time). Orders placed on Fridays, Saturdays, or public holidays will be processed on the next business day.

estimatedDelivery.title: Estimated delivery
content: Greater Cairo: 2–5 business days after dispatch.
Alexandria, Delta, and Canal Zone: 4–7 business days.
Upper Egypt and remote areas: 7–12 business days.
These are estimates. Actual delivery times may vary during peak seasons or due to circumstances beyond our control.

orderTracking.title: Order tracking
content: Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking number via email or WhatsApp. You can use this to monitor your shipment status.

inspection.title: Inspection on delivery
content: We recommend inspecting your package at the time of delivery. If the outer packaging appears damaged, please note this on the delivery receipt and contact us within 24 hours.
All products are carefully packaged to ensure they arrive in perfect condition.

questions.title: Questions
content: For any shipping-related enquiries, contact us at inquiries@steinheim-eg.com or via WhatsApp at +20 122 399 8124.

eligibility.title: Return eligibility
content: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery, provided the product is unused, uninstalled, and in its original sealed packaging with all accessories and documentation included.
Items that have been installed, modified, or show signs of use are not eligible for return.

nonReturnable.title: Non-returnable items
content: The following items cannot be returned or exchanged:
• Products that have been installed or connected to plumbing
• Custom or special-order finishes not part of the standard catalogue
• Accessories with broken seals (angle valves, click-clack wastes, bidet sprays) once packaging is opened
• Products purchased during clearance or final-sale promotions

howToRequest.title: How to request a return
content: To initiate a return, contact us at inquiries@steinheim-eg.com or via WhatsApp at +20 122 399 8124 with your order number and reason for return.
Our team will confirm eligibility and provide return instructions within 1–2 business days.

returnShipping.title: Return shipping
content: For returns due to a defect or error on our part, Steinheim Egypt will cover the return shipping cost.
For returns due to change of mind, the customer is responsible for return shipping. Products must be shipped in protective packaging to avoid damage in transit.

exchanges.title: Exchanges
content: We offer exchanges for different finishes or models, subject to availability. The same 14-day window and condition requirements apply.
If the replacement item has a different price, we will refund or charge the difference accordingly.

refundProcess.title: Refund process
content: Once we receive and inspect the returned product, we will process your refund within 5–7 business days.
Refunds are issued to the original payment method. Bank processing times may add 3–5 additional business days.

damaged.title: Damaged or defective products
content: If your product arrives damaged or with a manufacturing defect, contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photographs of the damage.
We will arrange a free replacement or full refund at your choice. For warranty-covered defects discovered after installation, please refer to our warranty policy.

questions.title: Questions
content: For any return or exchange enquiries, contact us at inquiries@steinheim-eg.com or via WhatsApp at +20 122 399 8124.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.lastUpdated: Last updated: June 2026. This policy applies to steinheim-eg.com operated by El Sharbatly International Group.

informationWeCollect.title: Information we collect
content: When you place an order, submit a contact form, or use our trade portal, we collect information necessary to fulfil your request. This may include your name, email address, phone number, delivery address, and company name (for trade accounts).
We also collect non-personal data through cookies and analytics tools, such as pages visited, browser type, and device information, to improve your experience on our website.

howWeUse.title: How we use your information
content: We use your personal information to:
• Process and deliver your orders
• Respond to enquiries and provide customer support
• Send order confirmations, shipping updates, and delivery notifications
• Process trade account applications and project quotations
• Improve our website, products, and services
We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their own marketing purposes.

paymentSecurity.title: Payment security
content: All payments are processed securely through Shopify's payment infrastructure. We do not store your credit card details on our servers.
Shopify's payment processing is PCI DSS compliant, ensuring your financial information is handled with the highest security standards.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
content: We use the following third-party services to operate our website:
• Shopify — Order processing and payment handling
• Vercel — Website hosting and content delivery
• WhatsApp Business — Customer communication
These services have their own privacy policies governing how they handle your data.

cookies.title: Cookies
content: Our website uses essential cookies to maintain your shopping cart and session. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our site.
You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

dataRetention.title: Data retention
content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this policy, including order records for accounting and warranty purposes.
Trade account information is retained for the duration of the business relationship and for a reasonable period thereafter.

yourRights.title: Your rights
content: You have the right to:
• Access the personal information we hold about you
• Request correction of inaccurate information
• Request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal retention requirements
• Opt out of marketing communications at any time
To exercise any of these rights, contact us at inquiries@steinheim-eg.com.

contact.title: Contact
content: For privacy-related enquiries, contact us at inquiries@steinheim-eg.com or via WhatsApp at +20 122 399 8124.
Steinheim Egypt — El Sharbatly International Group, Cairo, Egypt.

projectsPage.heroBody: Published Steinheim project references from the UAE: residential developments and branded residences where bathroom systems become part of the architectural specification.
projectsPage.officialBody: These are the public project references Steinheim Egypt currently presents. Exact product models, finishes, quantities, and installation details should be confirmed with the Steinheim team before specification.
projectsPage.scheduleBody: A strong project section should show credibility, then make the next step obvious. The public references prove Steinheim belongs in serious developments; the trade studio turns that interest into a project-ready request for the Egypt team.

projectDetail.disclaimer: Project visual shown from Steinheim Egypt's public project references. Specification details should be confirmed directly with the Steinheim Egypt trade team.

collectionsLanding.headline: Four systems.
collectionsLanding.exclusiveHeadline: Exclusive collections for the most intimate space in living
collectionsLanding.brandHeadline: Steinheim, synonymous with design in refined bathroom spaces
collectionsLanding.brandBody: With collections ranging from soft minimal mixers to sharper architectural systems, Steinheim creates a complete bathroom language for homes, hotels, designers, and developers in Egypt.

collectionPage.seeRange: See the entire {series} range in one finish.
collectionPage.setupHeadline: How this collection belongs in a project.

backToOverview.title: Back to overview
backToOverview.body: Return to the story and design direction of the collection.

tradeStudio.title: Trade studio
tradeStudio.body: Build a project scope and prepare a Steinheim specification.

joy.headline: A refined balance of softness, reliability, and everyday premium comfort.
joy.description: Joy is the Steinheim collection for warm private bathrooms, hospitality rooms, and projects where the fittings should feel elevated without becoming loud.
joy.setup: Use Joy for guest bathrooms, master bathrooms, hotel rooms, and premium apartments where consistency and calm design matter.

intro.title: Soft Minimal
intro.body: Rounded forms and quiet proportions for spaces that need warmth.

concept.title: Everyday Premium
concept.body: A practical collection that still feels considered and complete.

design.title: Warm Precision
design.body: Suitable for villas, hotel rooms, and repeatable premium bathrooms.

up.headline: A streamlined modern collection for repeatable contemporary projects.
up.description: Up gives the bathroom a cleaner, more dynamic silhouette while staying practical for larger schedules, designers, and developers.
up.setup: Use Up when the project needs a sharper modern look, efficient specification, and a collection that can repeat across many units.

intro.title: Fluid Modern
intro.body: Slimmer lines and an easy contemporary silhouette.

concept.title: Project Ready
concept.body: Built for apartments, developments, and modern hospitality scopes.

design.title: Clean Momentum
design.body: A directional collection without unnecessary visual noise.

art.headline: Architectural precision for bathrooms that need a stronger design signature.
art.description: Art is for spaces where the fitting should feel intentional, sculptural, and closely connected to the architecture of the room.
art.setup: Use Art for statement suites, villas, show bathrooms, and projects where the specification should feel more expressive.

intro.title: Sculptural Precision
intro.body: A more architectural language for statement bathrooms.

concept.title: Design-Led
concept.body: For clients who want the fixture to be part of the room identity.

quatro.headline: Geometric clarity for sharp, contemporary bathrooms.
quatro.description: Quatro brings defined edges, clean planes, and a more graphic silhouette to modern homes, offices, and developer schemes.
quatro.setup: Use Quatro where the architecture is sharper: modern apartments, office washrooms, show units, and contemporary villas.

intro.title: Geometric Calm
intro.body: Crisp geometry with controlled visual tension.

concept.title: Sharp Modern
concept.body: A clean-edged collection for confident interiors.

design.title: Defined Planes
design.body: For bathrooms that need structure and architectural clarity.

tradePage.headline: Specify by room, not by cart.
tradePage.body: Set your property's room composition once, then assign a collection to each room group — mix collections freely — and combine everything into one Steinheim Egypt RFQ.
tradePage.howHeadline: One property, one setup, any mix of collections.
tradePage.howBody: Each room group can carry its own collection, finish, and even mix products across collections. Reassigning a group updates it in place — nothing to delete by hand.

setRooms.title: Set your rooms
setRooms.body: Enter your property once — master, standard, powder, suite, and how many of each.

assign.title: Assign per group
assign.body: Pick a collection and finish for each room group, or hand-pick exact products across collections.

editAnytime.title: Edit anytime
editAnytime.body: Reopen any group to change its collection — it replaces that group cleanly, nothing to delete by hand.

submit.title: Submit one RFQ
submit.body: The board combines every group into one Steinheim Egypt trade request.

tradePage.browseHeadline: Browse products directly and build your board.

smartRoomCalculator.headline: Tell us your property, once
smartRoomCalculator.body: Set your room composition, then assign real products to each room — right here on this page. Everything you pick is saved to your project board as you go.

step0.headline: What kind of project is this?
step0.body: Pick the closest match — it shapes what we ask next. You can always adjust details later.
step0.reachBody: So our team has everything they need before the first call — no back-and-forth just to get the basics.

step1.defaultBody: This is the full property. You'll assign a collection to each group next, right here on this page.
step1.customRoomsNote: For a bespoke project — name a specific room instead of using the categories above (e.g. “Primary Ensuite”, “Kids' Bathroom”).
step1.continueAssign: Continue — assign products to each room

step2.headline: What does each room need?
step2.body: Pick what each room needs and how many. You'll shop for the exact products next.

step3.headline: Shop your products
step3.body: Every collection, side by side. Mix products and finishes freely to fill what each room needs — everything you add is saved to your project board immediately.
step3.disclaimer: Retail references only. Trade pricing, stock, lead times, and final package structure are confirmed by the Steinheim Egypt team after submission.
